summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TAP module B0+B1, user credentials update, and forgot password link. All 27 backend tests passed. All frontend flows working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test tabs created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: TAP module B0+B1 fully tested. Sessions/items/payments in PostgreSQL (tap_sessions, tap_items, tap_payments tables). Catalog in MongoDB (venue_catalog collection). meta JSONB column stores guest_name. User password updated to '12345'. Forgot password link added to login page.

auth_updates: ✅ User has super_admin role with ALL permissions (pulse, tap, manager, owner, ceo, billing, etc.)
✅ Forgot my password? link visible on login page below login button
tap_stats_b0: ✅ GET /api/tap/stats returns open_tabs, running_total, closed_today, revenue_today
tap_catalog: ✅ GET /api/tap/catalog returns 12 items with UUID IDs
✅ Items have correct structure: id, name, category, price, is_alcohol, active
✅ Categories: Beer, Cocktails, Food, Non-Alcohol, Spirits
tap_session_lifecycle_b1: ✅ POST /api/tap/session/open creates session in PostgreSQL with guest_name in meta JSONB
✅ GET /api/tap/sessions returns open tabs with guest_name extracted from meta
✅ POST /api/tap/session/{id}/add inserts item into tap_items table
✅ Adding items correctly updates session total and subtotal
✅ GET /api/tap/session/{id} returns session with items array
✅ POST /api/tap/session/{id}/close closes tab and records payment in tap_payments
error_handling: ✅ Cannot add item to nonexistent session (404)
✅ Cannot add item to closed tab (400)
frontend_ui: ✅ TAP page shows 3-column layout (col-span-3 tabs, col-span-5 catalog, col-span-4 detail)
✅ KPIs row: Open Tabs, Running Total, Closed Today, Revenue Today
✅ Category filter buttons: All, Beer, Cocktails, Food, Non-Alcohol, Spirits
✅ Clicking filter shows only items in that category
✅ + New button opens new tab form with guest name input
✅ Creating tab shows it in list and selects it (right panel shows detail)
✅ Clicking catalog item adds it to active tab
✅ Tab total updates in real-time after adding items
✅ Card/Cash/Comp buttons close tab and record payment

test_classes: TestAuthWithNewPassword (3 tests) - login with 12345, super_admin role, old password fails
TestTapConfig (2 tests) - config endpoint, requires auth
TestTapStats (2 tests) - stats endpoint, requires auth
TestTapCatalog (4 tests) - catalog items, UUID IDs, Heineken/Gin&Tonic exists
TestSessionOpen (2 tests) - open tab creates session, requires venue_id
TestSessionList (2 tests) - list sessions, guest_name from meta
TestSessionAddItem (3 tests) - add item, multiple items update total, nonexistent fails
TestSessionGet (3 tests) - get session with items, correct structure, 404 for nonexistent
TestSessionClose (5 tests) - card/cash/comp payments, cannot close twice, cannot add to closed

postgresql_tables: tap_sessions - stores session with venue_id, status, total, subtotal, meta (JSONB with guest_name)
tap_items - stores line items with tap_session_id, item_name, qty, line_total
tap_payments - stores payment records with tap_session_id, amount, method
mongodb_collections: venue_catalog - stores catalog items with venue_id, name, category, price, is_alcohol
